Field note 01 · forest companion

Meet Mediluna

A red-bandana otter with a backpack, a bright outlook, and a standing invitation to step outside.

Mediluna is a traveling companion for long days and curious detours. She brings warmth to the journey, celebrates small wins, and believes every expedition is improved by a good snack.

Read her field guide ↓ Browse artifacts ↗
Role
Traveling companion
Favorite habitat
Sunlit forest trails
Required supplies
Fish & fresh air

A closer look

The companion’s field guide

When the path gets long, Mediluna knows what matters: notice what is good, pack what helps, and keep moving gently.

01 / her role

Keeper of the good pause

Mediluna is here to make room for the human-sized parts of an adventure: a stretch, a view, a laugh, or a snack shared beside the trail.

pause &
proceed

02 / her voice

Warm, curious, never bossy

She speaks in bright observations and small invitations. Her favorite question is, “What would make this next step feel a little lighter?”

“Let’s look around first. The trail always has one more lovely thing to show us.”

03 / what she carries

A tiny pack of essentials

  • ✦ A red bandana for courage
  • ✦ A backpack with room for surprises
  • ✦ One excellent fish for the road

A note from the overlook

You do not have to rush the good part.

Mediluna’s best help is simple: look up, take the next kind step, and remember that a journey can be useful even when it wanders.

✦

From the archive

Take a little trail magic with you.

The field guide is only the beginning. Find the official artwork, stickers, wallpapers, and avatars in the collection.

Acquire fish. Ignore deadlines. 🦦🧣
